items.raw_excerpt: El municipio busca combatir la despoblación con siete viviendas en un solar municipal para atraer residentes
items.summary_en: A tiny municipality in Castellón plans to build seven homes on municipal land to fight depopulation. The project aims to attract residents by linking housing with work opportunities and help secure the village's future.
items.title_en: Castellón village of 30 residents to build apartments to attract new inhabitants
items.title_original: Un pueblo de Castellón con solo 30 vecinos construirá apartamentos para atraer habitantes y salvar su futuro - El Periódico Mediterráneo

items.raw_excerpt: Helsinki on pikkukaupunki, josta voi olla ylpeä, sanoo matkailupäällikkö Nina Vesterinen.
items.summary_en: Helsinki is attracting tourists, with the city’s tourism director arguing that the Finnish capital is neither expensive nor boring. She describes Helsinki as a small city that residents can be proud of.
items.title_en: Helsinki Draws Tourists as the Capital of a Happy Country
items.title_original: Onnellisen maan pääkaupunki vetää turisteja puoleensa – Helsingin matkailupäällikkö: ”Emme ole kallis, emme ole tylsä” - Yle

items.raw_excerpt: Zürich hat eine neue Anlaufstelle für Crack-Konsumierende eingerichtet. Das Container-Dorf von der Kasernenwiese ist in die früheren Polizeigaragen umgezogen.
items.summary_en: Zurich has opened a new contact point for people who use crack. The container village previously located at Kasernenwiese has moved into former police garages.
items.title_en: Zurich Opens New Crack Support Center in Former Police Garages
items.title_original: Zürich eröffnet neue Crack-Anlaufstelle in alten Polizeigaragen - Nau

items.raw_excerpt: Confira os bloqueios na Avenida Victor Ferreira do Amaral para o transporte de vigas do Novo Inter 2, a partir de segunda-feira (15/6)
items.summary_en: Curitiba city officials announced traffic blocks and detours on Avenida Victor Ferreira do Amaral starting Monday, June 15. The restrictions are for transporting beams for the Novo Inter 2 project in the Capão da Imbuia and Bairro Alto areas.
items.title_en: Traffic blocks and detours planned in Curitiba for beam installation
items.title_original: Operação de lançamento de vigas terá bloqueios de trânsito e desvios no Capão da Imbuia e Bairro Alto - Prefeitura de Curitiba

items.raw_excerpt: Helsinki Outletin valikoima laajenee kansainvälisesti tunnetulla brändillä, kun yhdysvaltalainen urheiluvaatebrändi Under Armour avaa myymälänsä outlet-kylään kesällä 2025.
items.summary_en: The American sportswear brand Under Armour will open a store at Helsinki Outlet in summer 2025. The opening will expand the outlet village's selection with an internationally known brand.
items.title_en: Under Armour to Open Outlet Store at Helsinki Outlet
items.title_original: Under Armour avaa outlet-myymälän Helsinki Outletiin - STT Info

items.raw_excerpt: A central Alberta town won't host its annual parade this year after organizers said a decision to disallow a pro-Alberta float led to a barrage of "online criticism, personal attacks, harassment, and abusive messages."
items.summary_en: A central Alberta town will not hold its annual parade this year after organizers disallowed a pro-Alberta float. Organizers said the decision led to overwhelming online criticism, personal attacks, harassment, and abusive messages.
items.title_en: Central Alberta town cancels annual parade after harassment over rejected float
items.title_original: Town cancels parade, citing 'overwhelming' harassment after pro-Alberta float disallowed

items.raw_excerpt: Die Agglomeration um den Flughafen will selbstbewusster auftreten, als urbaner Raum der Zukunft. Und dabei nicht zu sehr nach Zürich schielen, weil sie andere Stärken hat.
items.summary_en: The area around Zurich Airport wants to present itself more confidently as an urban space of the future. Local leaders argue it should lean on its own strengths rather than simply comparing itself with Zurich.
items.title_en: Is "New Zurich" More Than Just a Marketing Gimmick?
items.title_original: «New Zurich» – mehr als bloss ein Marketing-Gag? - Neue Zürcher Zeitung

items.raw_excerpt: Wien Tourismus sorgt mit schottischem Dorf Dull für viralen Social-Media-Hit. Die PR-Aktion zeigt: Wien ist alles andere als langweilig.
items.summary_en: Vienna Tourism invited the entire Scottish village of Dull to Vienna for a social media PR campaign. The stunt went viral by playing on the idea that Vienna is anything but boring.
items.title_en: Scottish village Dull invited to Vienna in viral tourism stunt
items.title_original: Gar nicht "dull" – Ganzes Dorf nach Wien eingeladen – Besuch geht viral - Heute

items.raw_excerpt: Built to house hydroelectric workers in the 1960s, Fusions Australia acquired Poatina, population 100, in 1995…
items.summary_en: A charity is selling Poatina, a remote Tasmanian Midlands village built in the 1960s to house hydroelectric workers. The village has about 100 residents and was acquired by Fusions Australia in 1995.
items.title_en: Charity Selling Remote Village in Tasmania's Midlands
items.title_original: Charity Selling Remote Village in Tasmania’s Midlands - The Urban Developer

items.raw_excerpt: Less than two hours from Brussels, Western City immerses visitors in an authentic atmosphere worthy of the American Wild West.
items.summary_en: Western City, an American Wild West-themed village less than two hours from Brussels, is preparing to welcome visitors again. The attraction features a saloon, gold mine, themed rooms, and an immersive frontier atmosphere.
items.title_en: Immersive Wild West Village Near Brussels Set to Reopen
items.title_original: Just 1 hour and 15 minutes from Brussels, this immersive Western village is set to reopen soon. A saloon, gold mine, themed rooms, and a Wild West atmosphere await! - Bruxelles Secrète

items.raw_excerpt: Accanto alla ruota, torna la pista di pattinaggio sul ghiaccio e fino al 6 gennaio il Villaggio di Natale con mercatini e street food
items.summary_en: A panoramic Ferris wheel is returning to Florence near the Fortezza da Basso. Alongside it, the ice-skating rink and a Christmas Village with markets and street food will run until January 6.
items.title_en: Ferris Wheel Returns to Florence
items.title_original: La ruota panoramica torna a Firenze - Firenze Made in Tuscany

items.raw_excerpt: The temperature fell to as low as -10.2° in the Utrecht village of Cabauw overnight, marking the first officially heavy frost of the winter. The temperature also fell to -10° in Gilze en Rijen in Noord-Brabant and Herwijnen in Gelderland, weather bureau Weeronline said on Tuesday. Coastal provinces will be hit by snow showers on Tuesday, but there may also be rain and sleet, Weeronline said. The east of the country will remain dry with plenty of sunshine and temperatures...
items.summary_en: Temperatures dropped to -10.2°C in Cabauw, marking the first official heavy frost of the winter. More snow showers, rain, and sleet are expected in coastal provinces, while the east stays mostly sunny and dry.
items.title_en: Wintry weather to continue in the Netherlands after first heavy frost
items.title_original: Wintry weather set to continue, more snow and heavy frosts - DutchNews.nl

items.raw_excerpt: Some football expressions are useful long after the match is over. One of the best examples is am Ball bleiben.
items.summary_en: The Local Austria highlights the German expression "am Ball bleiben," noting that some football phrases stay useful long after a match ends. It is a light language and culture item rather than major news.
items.title_en: German Expression of the Day: am Ball bleiben
items.title_original: German Expression of the Day: am Ball bleiben

items.raw_excerpt: DORSET — In the entranceway to the Dorset Village Public Library, a small but rather conspicuous sign warns visitors, "Caution, killer pugs."
items.summary_en: The Dorset Village Public Library greets visitors with a tongue-in-cheek sign warning them about "killer pugs." The story highlights small library dogs that have become a charming part of the local library experience.
items.title_en: 'Small, but mighty' library pugs enhance the library experience in Dorset
items.title_original: 'Small, but mighty' Library pugs continue to enhance library experience in Dorset - Manchester Journal

items.raw_excerpt: A large school of fish swarms near the surface of the water beneath an angler's fishing line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture. The coastal waters surrounding the port are known for a rich marine ecosystem that supports both local recreational angling and a thriving commercial fisheries industry,…
items.summary_en: A large school of fish gathered near the surface below an angler's line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City. The scene highlights the rich coastal waters around the port, where recreational fishing and commercial fisheries both thrive.
items.title_en: Swarm of fish
items.title_original: Swarm of fish

items.raw_excerpt: Wie der einstige Investor des Kulturhauses Kosmos seinen Mikrokosmos gefunden hat.
items.summary_en: The former main investor in Zurich's Kosmos cultural venue has found a new small world in the Tuscan village of Tatti. The story follows how Ruedi Gerber became attached to the village and is trying to bring it new life through film.
items.title_en: A Film Against Rural Flight: Zurich's Ruedi Gerber Falls for the Village of Tatti
items.title_original: Ein Film gegen die Landflucht – der Zürcher Ruedi Gerber verliebt sich ins Dorf Tatti - Neue Zürcher Zeitung

items.raw_excerpt: El Gobierno confirma la única candidatura valenciana de una localidad de poco más de 1.000 habitantes que competirá con Burgos, Cáceres, Granada, Jerez de la
items.summary_en: Potries, a Valencian town of just over 1,000 residents, has been confirmed as the only Valencian candidacy for European Capital of Culture 2031. The rural pottery village will compete with larger Spanish cities including Burgos, Cáceres, Granada, and Jerez de la Frontera.
items.title_en: Potries, a pottery village in rural Valencia, wants to be European Capital of Culture 2031
items.title_original: Potries, el pueblo alfarero de la Valencia rural que quiere ser capital europea de la cultura 2031 - La Vanguardia

items.raw_excerpt: One of Vermont's most historic cheesemakers got a chance to continue its legacy by teaming up with another to bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_en: A historic Vermont cheesemaker is continuing its legacy through a partnership with another cheesemaker. The collaboration aims to help bring Grafton Village Cheese into the future while preserving its local identity.
items.title_en: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese
items.title_original: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese - WCAX

items.raw_excerpt: Ontario is filled with postcard-worthy small towns, and this dreamy destination is one worth visiting. Less than two hours from Toronto, the hidden gem is a beautiful summer escape, complete with char...
items.summary_en: Yahoo News Canada highlights a small Ontario village less than two hours from Toronto as a scenic summer escape. The piece frames it as a postcard-worthy hidden gem with charming cafes, shops, and rolling-hill scenery.
items.title_en: Little Ontario Village Amid Rolling Hills Features Cute Cafes and Shops
items.title_original: This little Ontario village tucked amidst rolling hills is dotted with cute cafes and shops - Yahoo News Canada

items.raw_excerpt: From eight themed mazes to a quirky miniature village, Promised Land in Tasmania offers a surprising mix of attractions set against the backdrop of mountain scenery.
items.summary_en: Promised Land in Tasmania is described as an unexpected local attraction with eight themed mazes and a quirky miniature village. The small destination pairs playful roadside-style sights with mountain scenery.
items.title_en: Tasmania's Promised Land Packs Mazes and a Miniature Village
items.title_original: You Won't Believe This Town Is In Tasmania - WorldAtlas
